C. Gait Training 

Gait evaluation and training furnished to a patient whose ability to walk has been 
impaired by neurological, muscular or skeletal abnormality require the skills of a 
qualified physical therapist and constitute skilled physical therapy and are considered 
reasonable and necessary if they can be expected to materially improve or maintain the 
patient's ability to walk or
